title: SOLID Principles
description: Master Single Responsibility, Open-Closed, Liskov Substitution, Interface Segregation, and Dependency Inversion.
learningObjectives: Refactor rigid classes using Open-Closed inheritance hooks
Apply Dependency Inversion via Interfaces/Abstract classes to decouple modules

sections.title: SOLID Design Patterns for Games
sections.content:
SOLID principles guide OOP design:

1. **Single Responsibility**: A class should have one reason to change.
2. **Open-Closed**: Open for extension, closed for modification.
3. **Liskov Substitution**: Derived types must be substituteable for their base types.
4. **Interface Segregation**: Lean interfaces over massive, general-purpose ones.
5. **Dependency Inversion**: Depend on abstractions, not concrete implementations.

sections.title: Dependency Inversion in Audio Systems
